name: Splash Mage
name_jp: スプラッシュ・メイジ
desc:
2 Cyberse monsters
You can target 1 Cyberse monster in your GY; Special Summon it in Defense Position, but negate its effects, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Cyberse monsters. You can only use this effect of "Splash Mage" once per turn.
mnst_eff:
2 Cyberse monsters
You can target 1 Cyberse monster in your GY; Special Summon it in Defense Position, but negate its effects, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Cyberse monsters. You can only use this effect of "Splash Mage" once per turn.
eff:
2 Cyberse monsters
You can target 1 Cyberse monster in your GY; Special Summon it in Defense Position, but negate its effects, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Cyberse monsters. You can only use this effect of "Splash Mage" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
